_comment: 8 vertical spokes, 13 LEDs each (104 total). Wiring: spoke 0 data-in-at-top (data flows down the spoke from canopy to tip); spokes 1-7 each data-in-at-bottom (data flows up from tip to canopy), all in the same direction — no per-column alternation, no zigzag. Hence orientation=4 (VERTICAL_FIRST_DOWN). Confirmed against hardware 2026-05-18 against controller SN DC9BECDFB0ECEE13.
